item.title: happy early st patrick's day
item.description: Wishing everyone a fun and festive early St. Patrick's Day celebration.

media:content.media:title: happy early st patrick's day
media:content.media:description: Wishing everyone a fun and festive early St. Patrick's Day celebration.

item.title: blacked out for life...
item.description: One unforgettable moment turned into a story that will never be lived down.

media:content.media:title: blacked out for life...
media:content.media:description: One unforgettable moment turned into a story that will never be lived down.

item.title: The room did not let that slide for a second.
item.description: The instant reaction from everyone made the moment even funnier.

media:content.media:title: The room did not let that slide for a second.
media:content.media:description: The instant reaction from everyone made the moment even funnier.

item.title: The room definitely heard that differently.
item.description: One comment took an unexpected turn when everyone interpreted it the wrong way.

media:content.media:title: The room definitely heard that differently.
media:content.media:description: One comment took an unexpected turn when everyone interpreted it the wrong way.

item.title: it's like i'm not even there
item.description: Sometimes feeling invisible says more than words ever could.

media:content.media:title: it's like i'm not even there
media:content.media:description: Sometimes feeling invisible says more than words ever could.

item.title: what would you say back to that?
item.description: The comeback you choose says everything.

media:content.media:title: what would you say back to that?
media:content.media:description: The comeback you choose says everything.

item.title: 7 + 7 =13 just like 9 + 10 = 21
item.description: Math has officially entered its own alternate universe.

media:content.media:title: 7 + 7 =13 just like 9 + 10 = 21
media:content.media:description: Math has officially entered its own alternate universe.

item.title: Wait for the exact moment he gives in.
item.description: The payoff is worth waiting for.

media:content.media:title: Wait for the exact moment he gives in.
media:content.media:description: The payoff is worth waiting for.

item.title: The room got real quiet after that one.
item.description: One sentence changed the whole atmosphere.

media:content.media:title: The room got real quiet after that one.
media:content.media:description: One sentence changed the whole atmosphere.

item.title: How do you call twins
item.description: This question has a surprisingly funny answer.

media:content.media:title: How do you call twins
media:content.media:description: This question has a surprisingly funny answer.

item.title: The room knowing he shouldn’t have gotten away with it makes this better.
item.description: Everyone knew he got away with something and it made the moment even funnier.

media:content.media:title: The room knowing he shouldn’t have gotten away with it makes this better.
media:content.media:description: Everyone knew he got away with something and it made the moment even funnier.

item.title: Family Business
item.description: Keeping it all in the family has never been this entertaining.

media:content.media:title: Family Business
media:content.media:description: Keeping it all in the family has never been this entertaining.

item.title: Wait for the part they tried to laugh off.
item.description: They tried to play it off but everyone noticed.

media:content.media:title: Wait for the part they tried to laugh off.
media:content.media:description: They tried to play it off but everyone noticed.

item.title: do we want honesty or not?
item.description: Sometimes the truth is the funniest answer.

media:content.media:title: do we want honesty or not?
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the truth is the funniest answer.

item.title: The Grinch gets arrested
item.description: Even the Grinch could not escape the law.

media:content.media:title: The Grinch gets arrested
media:content.media:description: Even the Grinch could not escape the law.

item.title: The second he admitted it, the whole room turned on him.
item.description: One confession was all it took to change the room.

media:content.media:title: The second he admitted it, the whole room turned on him.
media:content.media:description: One confession was all it took to change the room.

item.title: Wait for the moment everyone realizes he meant it.
item.description: The exact moment everyone realizes he was completely serious.

media:content.media:title: Wait for the moment everyone realizes he meant it.
media:content.media:description: The exact moment everyone realizes he was completely serious.
